title: pinguicula vulgaris var. juratensis
intro: Pinguicula vulgaris var. juratensis, also known as the Jurat flytrap or bladderwort, is a carnivorous plant species that obtains essential nutrients by capturing and digesting small insects. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pinguicula vulgaris var. juratensis are attributed to its richness in vitamins A and C, as well as its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in immune system support and wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
